Title: Tangleroot Gorge
Description:
Southwest of Stormreach is Tangleroot Gorge, home of ferocious hobgoblins, 
deadly spiders, and bugbear and troglodyte tribes. The terrible hobgoblin
fortress of Splinterskull is in the midst of it all. At the behest of the hobgoblin
Chief Ungurz you begin your Assault on Splinterskull and try to survive the
formidable black widow Whisperdoom and her vicious spawn!
ReleaseInfo:
Tangleroot Gorge is an adventure pack for Dungeons & Dragons Online set in Tangleroot 
Gorge near tormreach. The adventure pack was made part of the pre-release Public Beta
Test Module 0 onJanuary 24, 2006.

Title: Demon Sands of Menechtarun
Description: The sprawling dunes of Menechtarun hide deadly secrets and are home to powerful new enemies. Beware - despite these new monsters your most dangerous enemy might now be another adventurer…
